name: Lentil Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 cups lentils (any color), rinsed and drained
1 - 1 1/2 teaspoons summer savory [I didn't measure it exactly.]
5 cups water (or use part broth if you want)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine all ingredients.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce the heat and cover the pot.
4. Simmer for 30-40 minutes until the lentils are tender.
5. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
6. Serve over brown rice or potatoes, making 4 servings.
The vegetables used can vary based on availability. For a heartier soup-like consistency, add more water and a can of pureed tomatoes, or include additional potatoes with the other vegetables.
